mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leaderboard_cycle (leaderboard_id, cycle_seq, cycle_start_time, cycle_end_time, status, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{leaderboardId}, #{cycleSeq}, #{cycleStartTime}, #{cycleEndTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM leaderboard_cycle WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM leaderboard_cycle WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} ORDER BY cycle_seq DESC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(cycle_seq), 0) FROM leaderboard_cycle WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId}
